name: codebase-impact tallies violation count for each candidate rule
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/codebase-impact.sh" --rule-file "$PWD/rule.yaml" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>impact.txt && grep -E "\"violation_count\":3" impact.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p tree && for i in 1 2 3; do printf 'console.log(%d)\n' "$i" > "tree/$i.js"; done

printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - id: no-console
    name: no-console
    description: x
    detector: bash -c "grep -l console.log"
' > rule.yaml
